title: chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. stoloniferum
intro: Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. stoloniferum, also known as yellow buttons, is a subspecies of the Chrysocephalum apiculatum plant, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. stoloniferum can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it has also been used in combination with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal properties.
